# https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/
# Updated: 2026-02-22

# Allow all search engines to index public docs
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# No sensitive paths in this site, but disallow any private/ dir if added later
Disallow: /private/

# Sitemap for search engines
Sitemap: https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/sitemap.xml

# LLM crawlers — read llms.txt / llms.json
# https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
# https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/llms.json
